text.p: A LETTER OF COMPLAINING ABOUT THE POOR OF ROAD IN TOWN AND DISCUSSING THE CONSEQUENCES.

I am very happy to write this letter to you, the purpose of my letter to you , is to tell you some thing about the complaining the poor state road in your town, my Chairman Sir , We are a need of you to give us the power to enforce and settle the poor state road that we are having in your town, and also, my Chairman sir, I will also like to 2 characters enlight you on some thing , that many people that are living within us are not comfortable, because of ha-ving poor state roads, 3 characters my chai-man Sir , I considered before that, because if the road is well good, you discovered that many people will be comming to ha earn their living, and also, my chairman Sir, base on my understanding and ideal I think if possible we should have a good road in the state of the citizen, many people will be achieved their aims and other thing, like because I abserved that if the road is till bad there would not be any achievement in your local government Area, dear my chairman , I am p I will keep on praying to God so that Almighty God should give the us opportunity of constructing those poor road that is within the local government.
